title.en: RIDER PROPULSION OF WHEELED VEHICLES OR SLEDGES; POWERED PROPULSION OF SLEDGES OR {SINGLE-TRACK} CYCLES; TRANSMISSIONS SPECIALLY ADAPTED FOR SUCH VEHICLES (arrangements or mounting of transmissions in vehicles in general B60K; transmission elements per se F16)
Rider propulsion of wheeled vehicles (rider propulsion with additional source of power B62M6/00; propulsion by ground-engaging rods B62M29/02)
involving devices which enable the mechanical storing and releasing of energy occasionally, e.g. arrangement of flywheels
operated by both hand and foot power
operated exclusively by hand power
by movement of rider's saddle
with reciprocating levers, e.g. foot levers (levers with can be immobilised as foot rests B62M5/00)
by walking on an endless belt
with rotary cranks, e.g. with pedal cranks (B62M1/34 takes precedence; combined with reciprocating levers B62M1/26; cranks which can be immobilised as foot rests B62M5/00)
Construction of cranks operated by hand or foot
{Combination of crank axles and bearings housed in the bottom bracket (bottom bracket frame details B62K19/34)}
{Crank arrangements to overcome dead points}
of adjustable length
with elliptical or other non-circular rotary movement
Pedals
Hand-grips for hand-operated cranks
Accessories
Foot-driven levers as pedal cranks which can be immobilised as foot-rests (immobilising against theft B62H5/10)
Rider propulsion of wheeled vehicles with additional source of power, e.g. combustion engine or electric motor
Rider propelled cycles with auxiliary combustion engine
Rider propelled cycles with auxiliary electric motor
Accessories, e.g. power sources; Arrangements thereof

Motorcycles characterised by position of motor or engine (rider propulsion with addition source of power, e.g. auxiliary combustion engine or electric motor B62M6/00; frames characterised by position of engine B62K11/00)
{the cycle being equipped with a pneumatic motor}
with engine between front and rear wheels
with the engine over the rear wheel
with the engine over the front wheel
with the engine beside or within the driven wheel
with the engine on an auxiliary wheeled unit, e.g. trailer, sidecar (trailers B60P, B62D; sidecars B62K27/00)
Transmissions characterised by use of an endless chain, belt, or the like (cycle chain guards B62J13/00)
{Non-circular chain rings or sprockets}
{Details of transmission chains specially adapted for bicycles}
{Guides to prevent chain from slipping off the sprocket}
of unchangeable ratio
of changeable ratio
Tensioning or adjusting equipment for chains, belts or the like
Transmissions characterised by the use of interengaging toothed wheels or frictionally-engaging wheels (with roller engaging the periphery of ground wheel B62M13/00)
of unchangeable ratio
of changeable ratio
Transmissions characterised by use of friction rollers engaging the periphery of the ground wheel (for rider propelled cycles with additional source of power B62M6/35, B62M6/75)
with changeable ratio, e.g. with roller of varying diameter
with means for moving roller into driving contact with ground wheel
Transmissions characterised by use of crank shafts and coupling rods
Transmissions characterised by use of rotary shaft, e.g. cardan shaft
Transmissions characterised by use of non-mechanical gearing, e.g. fluid gearing
Transmissions characterised by use of resilient elements therein
Transmissions characterised by use of other elements; Other transmissions

characterised by the use of two or more dissimilar sources of power, e.g. transmissions for hybrid motorcycles (transmissions for wheeled vehicles using rider propulsion with additional source of power B62M6/00)
Actuators for gearing speed-change mechanisms specially adapted for cycles (rider operated controls for cycles in general B62K23/00; gearing speed change mechanisms F16H)
{with gear indicating means, e.g. a display}
{with auxiliary shift assisting means}
with mechanical transmitting systems, e.g. cables, levers
with electrical or fluid transmitting systems
Propulsion devices for sledges or the like (pushed or pulled by persons or animals B62B, B62C; wind propulsion B62B15/00)
power driven
Ground engaging propulsion devices for cycles, sledges, or rider-propelled wheeled vehicles, not otherwise provided for {(non-motorized scooters with skis or runners B62K3/002)}
using ground-engaging rods
